     the Fermi energy is    -0.2686 ev

!    total energy              =   -6579.25661816 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          9.5E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.26509602 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -116049.32458063 Ry
